title: Short drama (微短剧 / 竖屏短剧) script
description: Machine-read source of truth for a serialized vertical micro-drama, at projects/{slug}/drama/{lang}/{slug}.drama.json. Episodes are an ordered list; each episode has beats (role-tagged micro-structure) and a mandatory end-of-episode cliffhanger. A human-facing preview is rendered into a sibling .md. The deterministic gate (scripts/check-short-drama.mjs) enforces the genre's reproducible structure/pacing/compliance facts (grounded in docs/research/2026-06-06-short-drama-structure.md): episode 1 opens on a hook, EVERY episode ends on a non-empty cliffhanger, episode numbers are 1-based/contiguous/unique, the paywall episode (if set) resolves and is not last, per-episode spoken runtime is within tolerance of target, and a synopsis exists. 'Is it a hit / enough reversals / value orientation' is content-review's job, not the gate's. Topic should reuse keyword-research (never invent demand).

genre.description: 题材：甜宠/逆袭/复仇/战神/悬疑/穿越… (content-review judges fit; not gated).

synopsis.description: 内容概要 (剧情梗概). 备案 wants ≥500字; the gate enforces a configurable min (default 100).

keyword.description: Target topic/keyword, ideally backed by a *.research.json with decision: pursue.

target_seconds_per_episode.description: 竖屏单集目标时长(秒). The gate checks each episode's estimated spoken runtime is within tolerance of this. Default 90 (gate).

spoken_cpm.description: Spoken chars-per-minute for the runtime estimate (ZH speech ~240). Default 240 (gate).

tolerance.description: Allowed fraction over/under target per episode. Default 0.5 (gate) — script-word timing is coarse.

min_episodes.description: Minimum episode count to count as a serialized drama. Default 2 (gate).

min_synopsis_chars.description: Minimum synopsis length. Default 100 (gate); set 500 to mirror 备案.

paywall_episode.description: 1-based index of the 付费卡点 episode. If set, must resolve to a real episode and must NOT be the last one (paywall mid-series).

episodes.description: Ordered episodes. Episode 1's first beat must be role 'hook'; EVERY episode must have a non-empty cliffhanger.

number.description: 1-based episode number; must be contiguous and unique across the series.

title.description: Short episode label (shown as a heading in the rendered doc).

beats.description: Ordered intra-episode beats (the micro three-act). Episode 1's FIRST beat must be role 'hook'.

role.description: hook = 黄金前3秒强冲突; setup = 铺垫; escalation = 冲突升级; twist = 反转; payoff = 爽点/情绪释放.

lines.description: 对白/旁白 spoken text. Char count drives the runtime estimate; action-only beats may omit it.

cliffhanger.description: 结尾钩子 — the end-of-episode suspense that drives the next click. MUST be non-empty (the genre's #1 rule).
